name: Grid
goal: Lay out child elements in a responsive grid with either a fixed column count or auto-fit minmax sizing.
description: Responsive grid container. Either uses a fixed column count (cols=2/3/4) or repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min, 1fr)) when auto is set. Below 640px the grid collapses to a single column.

props.name: cols
props.description: Fixed column count when auto is unset.

props.name: min
props.description: Minimum column width in pixels when auto is set.

props.name: auto
props.description: Use repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min, 1fr)) instead of fixed cols.

cssVariables.name: --ce-grid-min
cssVariables.description: Min column width when auto-fit; set inline from the min property.
